benefits.description: Behavior changed to be more energetic, does not feel tired after 10,000 steps, energy levels more than before
Rest of depression disappeared, optimistic to things in life, life more enjoyable
Sleep problems disappeared, slept 12 hours like in childhood, sleep patterns normalized for 1 month then slowly returned but never to old bad levels
Creativity levels increased by 3-4 times, desire to learn increased, restored productivity as a painter spending 95% of time painting and creating

protocol_notes: 64-year-old participant. Russian Peptide source. Dosage 10mg. Previously tried animal-source epithalon which showed same effects but only on day 5 instead of immediate.
